name: Carne Asada Tacos
tagline: Citrus-marinated grilled steak in warm corn tortillas
highlight: No soy in marinade — citrus and chili do the lift

hero.alt: Carne asada tacos with onion and cilantro
hero.caption: carne asada — citrus-charred

healthFacts: Lime and orange marinade gives flavor while tenderizing.
Corn tortillas are gluten-free and lower-glycemic than wheat.

steps.title: Marinate the steak
steps.detail: Whisk citrus, garlic, cilantro, spices, olive oil, salt. Submerge steak; refrigerate 30 min (up to 4 hours).
steps.tip: Don't go past 4 hours — citrus turns the meat mealy.

steps.title: Sear hard
steps.detail: Get a cast iron blazing hot. Pat steak dry; sear 3 min per side for medium-rare.
steps.tip: Wet steak from marinade = steam, not crust. Pat. Dry. Down.

steps.title: Rest then dice
steps.detail: Rest steak 5 min. Slice thin across the grain, then dice — taco-sized.
steps.tip: Dicing happens after slicing — get the grain right first.

steps.title: Warm and assemble
steps.detail: Char tortillas over a flame or in a dry skillet 30 sec per side. Pile meat on top with diced onion, cilantro, lime wedge.
steps.tip: Two tortillas per taco — one breaks, the other catches.
